name: Dark Seer
description: If your enemy is equal, prepare for him.

abilities.name: Quick Wit
abilities.description: Grants self flat bonus attack speed per current. Attack Speed Bonus per Int: 1. Max Health as Heal: 10%. Max Health as Heal Increase: 1.5%. Max Mana as Mana Restore: 10%. Max Mana as Mana Restore Increase: 1.5%.

abilities.name: Vacuum
abilities.description: Creates a vacuum within the area-targeted location that sucks in all enemy units within the radius, interrupting and dealing damage. Cast Range: 450/500/550/600. Effect Radius: 325/400/475/550 (400/475/550/625). Damage: 70/130/190/250. Pull Duration: 0.3/0.4/0.5/0.6. Cooldown: 60/50/40/30. Mana Cost: 60/90/120/150.

abilities.name: Ion Shell
abilities.description: Surrounds the target unit with a bristling shield that damages enemy units in an area around it. Cast Range: 800. Damage Radius: 275 (340). Damage per Second: 30/50/70/90 (80/100/120/140). Duration: 20/22/24/26. Cooldown: 9 (0). Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Surge
abilities.description: The charged-up allied unit leave behind a trail that damages and slows enemy units around it. Does not create the Surge trail with Alt-Cast toggled on. Cast Range: 600. Haste Speed: 550. Duration: 3/4/5/6. Trail Width: (150). Damage Interval: (0.5). Damage per Second: (40). Cooldown: 24/19/14/9 (22.5/17.5/12.5/7.5). Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Normal Punch
abilities.description: The next attack on an enemy hero has True Strike, damages, and stuns based on Dark Seer's recently moved distance. The punch knocks a replica of the affected enemy hero that deals additional damage and receives additional incoming damage. Movement Timer: 3. Max Values Distance: 1100. Min Knock Distance: 10. Max Knock Distance: 350. Min Damage: 10. Max Damage: 400. Cooldown: 10.

abilities.name: Wall of Replica
abilities.description: These replicas deals additional damage and also receives additional incoming damage. The Dark Seer, while unable to return to his natural realm, can channel part of the prismatic wall with powerful strength of mind, sowing confusion amongst enemy ranks. Cast Range: 1000. Number of Walls: 1. Wall Length: 1300. Wall Width: 50. Damage Upon Illusion Creation: 25/40/55. Move Speed Slow: 40%. Cooldown: 100 (60). Mana Cost: 125/250/375.
